JURY TRIAL CONTINUED TO MAR-16-1999 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 504 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL
NOTICE OF DEFAULT ON APPEAL SENT TO APPELLANT

REMITTITUR FILED APPELLANT WAS SERVED WITH NOTICE OF DEFAULT ON 7-1-99 FOR FAILURE TO POST FEES ON REPORTER'S TRANSCRIPTS WHICH IS DUE ON OR BEFORE 7-15-99. A MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT PURSUANT TO RULE 104, HAS NOT BEEN FILED WITHIN 10 DAYS OF SERVICE OF THE NOTICE OF DEFAULT. THEREFORE, IT IS ORDERED THAT THE APPEAL IS DISMISSED PURSUANT TO RULE 133C.
